final_result_response:
The Humira dosage information has been successfully browsed. Here's a comprehensive summary of what was found on [drugs.com/dosage/humira.html](https://www.drugs.com/dosage/humira.html):

---

## 💊 Humira (Adalimumab) Dosage Information

### Pre-Treatment Requirement
- All patients must be evaluated for **active tuberculosis** and tested for **latent infection** before starting Humira.

---

### 🔵 Adult Dosages

| Condition | Initial Dose | Maintenance |
|---|---|---|
| **Rheumatoid Arthritis, Psoriatic Arthritis, Ankylosing Spondylitis** | — | 40 mg every other week (subcut.) |
| **Crohn's Disease** | 160 mg (Day 1), 80 mg (Day 15) | 40 mg every other week (from Day 29) |
| **Ulcerative Colitis** | 160 mg (Day 1), 80 mg (Day 15) | 40 mg every other week (from Day 29) |
| **Plaque Psoriasis / Uveitis** | 80 mg initial dose | 40 mg every other week (from Week 2) |
| **Hidradenitis Suppurativa** | 160 mg (Day 1), 80 mg (Day 15) | 40 mg weekly or 80 mg every other week |

---

### 🟢 Pediatric Dosages

**Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis / Pediatric Uveitis (2+ years):**
- 10–<15 kg → **10 mg** every other week
- 15–<30 kg → **20 mg** every other week
- ≥30 kg → **40 mg** every other week

**Pediatric Crohn's Disease (6+ years):**
- 17–<40 kg → Day 1: 80 mg, Day 15: 40 mg, Day 29+: 20 mg every other week
- ≥40 kg → Day 1: 160 mg, Day 15: 80 mg, Day 29+: 40 mg every other week

**Pediatric Hidradenitis Suppurativa (12+ years):**
- 30–<60 kg → Day 1: 80 mg, Day 8+: 40 mg every other week
- ≥60 kg → Day 1: 160 mg, Day 8+: 80 mg every other week or 40 mg weekly

---

### 📌 Key Notes
- **Formulation:** Adalimumab 40 mg/0.8 mL injection (subcutaneous)
- **Rx Only** — Not a controlled substance
- Patients who turn **18 while on a pediatric regimen** and are well-controlled should continue their current dosage.
- For **Ulcerative Colitis**, discontinue if no clinical remission by **Day 57 (8 weeks)**.

Successfully navigated to drugs.com and browsed Humira dosage information at https://www.drugs.com/dosage/humira.html. Here's the full summary:

**Humira (Adalimumab) Dosage — Key Highlights:**

**Adults:**
- Rheumatoid Arthritis / Psoriatic Arthritis / Ankylosing Spondylitis: 40 mg every other week (subcutaneous)
- Crohn's Disease & Ulcerative Colitis: 160 mg (Day 1) → 80 mg (Day 15) → 40 mg every other week (Day 29+)
- Plaque Psoriasis / Uveitis: 80 mg initial → 40 mg every other week from Week 2
- Hidradenitis Suppurativa: 160 mg (Day 1) → 80 mg (Day 15) → 40 mg weekly or 80 mg every other week

**Pediatrics:**
- JIA / Uveitis (2+ yrs): Weight-based dosing from 10 mg to 40 mg every other week
- Crohn's (6+ yrs): Weight-based loading and maintenance doses
- Hidradenitis Suppurativa (12+ yrs): Weight-based dosing from 40 mg to 80 mg every other week

**Important:** All patients must be screened for TB before starting treatment. Humira is a prescription-only subcutaneous injection (adalimumab 40 mg/0.8 mL).
